name: Pax Half Pack Oven Lid
summary: The Pax Half Pack Oven Lid is designed for the Pax 2 Vaporiser, Pax 3 vaporiser, Pax Mini, or PAX Plus, and reduces the chamber space by half.
description: The Pax Half Pack Oven Lid is designed for the Pax 2 Vaporiser, Pax 3 vaporiser, Pax Mini, or PAX Plus, and reduces the chamber space by half. This allows for a smaller amount of dried herbs to be used while still achieving efficient vaporisation. It is perfect for those looking to reduce their usage in a single session. Please note that this product is not compatible with the original Pax vaporiser. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
